summary: The test suite is exceptionally thorough and adheres strictly to the complex requirements. It features a tripartite design: static validation (actionlint, shellcheck), comprehensive unit/integration tests (bats), and a sophisticated CI-in-CI test harness (act). The use of temporary git repositories for act isolation and exact-match assertions on capture output demonstrates high rigor. It covers both manifest formats and all classification states (Approved, Denied, Unknown) while validating the GitHub Actions workflow structure and permissions.
